title: schizoloma induratum
intro: Schizoloma induratum, also known as the "leathery fern," is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schizoloma induratum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Schizoloma induratum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
